source.notes: Checked-in sample workflow aligned to curated home artifacts.

observedPreconditions: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Home page should load successfully before executing test steps
observedSteps: Verify approved navigation and action controls
Use supported controls to navigate to linked destinations
observedExpectedResult: The home page loads successfully, approved controls are visible and interactive, and supported navigation actions route the user to the expected destinations.
observedValidations: Approved controls are visible and enabled
Person button navigates to the login page
Customer signup button opens the customer-search page
Clean survey button opens the vehicle-survey page
Site survey button opens the survey page
